message.content:
@startuml
participant "«Tariff»\nAgileTariff" as AT
participant "Scheduler" as S

[-> AT: poll()
activate AT

alt [AgileTariff periods updated]
    AT -> S: getNextCheck
    activate S
    S --> AT: getNextCheck
    deactivate S

    alt [earliest new AgileTariff period is before nextCheck]
        AT -> S: setNextCheck(now)
        activate S
        S --> AT
        deactivate S
    end
end

deactivate AT
@enduml
